sentence: If I ______ you, I would study more for the exam.
explanation: En el segundo condicional (situaciones hipotéticas), se usa <were> para todos los pronombres, incluido <I>.
tip: In hypothetical situations, use the subjunctive form for all subjects.

sentence: Had I known about the traffic, I ______ a different route.
explanation: Esto es una inversión del tercer condicional. La estructura es 'Had + sujeto + participio pasado, sujeto + would have + participio pasado'.
tip: This is an inverted conditional — no 'if' needed when the clause starts with 'had'.

sentence: If you heat water to 100 degrees, it ______.
explanation: El condicional cero se usa para hechos generales o verdades científicas. La estructura es 'If + presente simple, ... presente simple'.
tip: Zero conditional: general truths use present simple in both clauses.

sentence: Unless you ______ now, you will miss the train.
explanation: <Unless> significa <si no>. Después de <unless>, se usa el verbo en afirmativo. <Unless you leave> = <If you don>t leave'.
tip: 'Unless' means 'if not' — the verb stays affirmative.

sentence: She would be a great musician if she ______ more.
explanation: Segundo condicional para una situación hipotética presente. La estructura es 'sujeto + would + infinitivo ... if + sujeto + pasado simple'.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: If she had studied, she ______ the exam.
explanation: Tercer condicional para una situación hipotética en el pasado. 'If + pasado perfecto, ... would have + participio pasado'.
tip: Think about an unreal past result — third conditional structure.

sentence: What would you do if it ______ tomorrow?
explanation: Segundo condicional para una situación hipotética futura. 'If + pasado simple, ... would + infinitivo'.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: If I see him, I ______ him the message.
explanation: Primer condicional para una situación real o probable en el futuro. 'If + presente simple, ... will + infinitivo'.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: They would have been lost if he ______ a map.
explanation: Tercer condicional que expresa una condición pasada que no ocurrió y su resultado hipotético.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: If you mix red and blue, you ______ purple.
explanation: Condicional cero para una verdad universal o un hecho científico.
tip: Zero conditional: general truths use present simple in both clauses.

sentence: Provided that you ______ on time, you'll get a good seat.
explanation: <Provided that> es similar a <if> y se usa con el presente simple para una condición futura.
tip: This conditional connector works like 'if' but with a condition emphasis.

sentence: I wouldn't go there if I ______ you.
explanation: En el segundo condicional, se prefiere <were> sobre <was> para todos los sujetos al expresar una hipótesis.
tip: In hypothetical situations, use the subjunctive form for all subjects.

sentence: If the weather ______ better, we would have gone to the beach.
explanation: Tercer condicional para una situación pasada irreal y su resultado.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: He will be late unless he ______ now.
explanation: <Unless> (a menos que) va seguido del presente simple para indicar una condición.
tip: 'Unless' means 'if not' — the verb stays affirmative.

sentence: If I had the money, I ______ a new car.
explanation: Segundo condicional para una situación presente o futura hipotética.
tip: The result clause of a hypothetical uses 'would' + base verb.

sentence: Should you ______ any help, just ask.
explanation: Esto es una forma invertida y más formal del primer condicional, omitiendo <if>. <Should you need> = <If you should need>.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: If he ______ harder, he will succeed.
explanation: Primer condicional para una posible situación futura.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: Water turns to ice if the temperature ______ below zero.
explanation: Condicional cero para un hecho científico.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: If they had invited me, I ______.
explanation: Tercer condicional para una situación hipotética en el pasado.
tip: Think about an unreal past result — third conditional structure.

sentence: As long as you ______ quiet, you can stay.
explanation: <As long as> (siempre y cuando) se usa con el presente simple para establecer una condición.
tip: This conditional connector works like 'if' but with a condition emphasis.

sentence: If I ______ a millionaire, I would travel the world.
explanation: Segundo condicional para una situación hipotética irreal en el presente. Se usa <were> para todos los sujetos.
tip: In hypothetical situations, use the subjunctive form for all subjects.

sentence: Unless it ______ tomorrow, we will go for a picnic.
explanation: <Unless> significa <si no>. Se usa con el presente simple para una condición futura.
tip: 'Unless' means 'if not' — the verb stays affirmative.

sentence: If she ______ earlier, she wouldn't have missed the bus.
explanation: Tercer condicional para una situación hipotética en el pasado.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: What ______ if you won the lottery?
explanation: Segundo condicional para una situación hipotética futura.
tip: The result clause of a hypothetical uses 'would' + base verb.

sentence: If you ______ water, it evaporates.
explanation: Condicional cero para hechos científicos o verdades generales.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: Had he ______ the instructions, he wouldn't have made a mistake.
explanation: Inversión del tercer condicional. 'Had + sujeto + participio pasado'.
tip: This is an inverted conditional — no 'if' needed when the clause starts with 'had'.

sentence: If I ______ you, I would apologize.
explanation: Segundo condicional para dar un consejo. Se usa <were> para todos los sujetos.
tip: In hypothetical situations, use the subjunctive form for all subjects.

sentence: She ______ if she knew the answer.
explanation: Segundo condicional para una situación hipotética en el presente.
tip: The result clause of a hypothetical uses 'would' + base verb.

sentence: If they ______ harder, they will pass the exam.
explanation: Primer condicional para una situación real o probable en el futuro.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: Provided that you ______ your work, you can go home.
explanation: <Provided that> se usa con el presente simple para una condición futura.
tip: This conditional connector works like 'if' but with a condition emphasis.

sentence: If I ______ more time, I would learn a new language.
explanation: Segundo condicional para una situación hipotética en el presente.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: Unless you ______ a valid passport, you cannot travel.
explanation: <Unless> significa <si no>. Se usa con el presente simple.
tip: 'Unless' means 'if not' — the verb stays affirmative.

sentence: If he ______ the truth, she would have forgiven him.
explanation: Tercer condicional para una situación hipotética en el pasado.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: What would you have done if you ______ in that situation?
explanation: Tercer condicional para una situación hipotética en el pasado.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: If you ______ the button, the machine starts.
explanation: Condicional cero para una verdad general.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: Should you ______ any problems, contact us immediately.
explanation: Forma invertida y más formal del primer condicional.
tip: Identify the conditional type (0, 1, 2, 3, or mixed) to choose the right tense.

sentence: If I ______ rich, I would buy a mansion.
explanation: Segundo condicional para una situación hipotética irreal.
tip: In hypothetical situations, use the subjunctive form for all subjects.

sentence: They ______ if they had known about the party.
explanation: Tercer condicional para una situación hipotética en el pasado.
tip: Think about an unreal past result — third conditional structure.

sentence: As long as you ______ your best, that's all that matters.
explanation: <As long as> se usa con el presente simple para establecer una condición.
tip: This conditional connector works like 'if' but with a condition emphasis.

sentence: If I ______ a bird, I would fly.
explanation: Segundo condicional para una situación hipotética irreal.
tip: In hypothetical situations, use the subjunctive form for all subjects.
